error_signature: Execute this node to view data
title: If node not receiving data from Google Drive node
symptom: The If node displays 'Execute this node to view data' when the Google Drive folder does not exist, preventing further workflow execution.
applies_when: Checking for folder existence with If node
not_this_if: Folder exists and data is outputted correctly
root_cause: The Google Drive node does not output any data when the specified folder does not exist, which leads to the If node not receiving any input data to evaluate.
fix_steps: Open the Google Drive node settings and activate the 'always output data' option.
In the If node, change the expression from '{{ $json.id }}' to '{{ $json }}'.
Change the input type from 'String > is empty' to 'Object > is empty'.
agent_instruction: Activate 'always output data' in the Google Drive node and adjust the If node settings as specified.
